name: Destroy Undead (CR 1/2 or below)

compilation_state.summary: Feature successfully generated from reference data.

description: Starting at 5th level, when an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead feature, the creature is instantly destroyed if its challenge rating is at or below a certain threshold. At 5th level, any undead of CR 1/2 or lower that fails its saving throw against Turn Undead is destroyed instantly.
lore: The divine light you channel has grown so intense that it no longer merely repels the weak dead; it consumes them entirely, leaving only ash behind.
